signals.headline: Bitcoin Surges Past $74K to One-Month High on April 14 Amid Easing U
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Surges Past $74K to One-Month High on April 14 Amid Easing U.S.-Iran Tensions and ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin broke key resistance at $74,000 on April 14, 2026, reaching ~$74,500-$75,000 with a 5.34% 24-hour gain, driven by de-escalation signals in the U.S.-Iran standoff (e.g., Trump negotiation comments, Strait of Hormuz relief) and $400M-$500M short liquidations[1][3]
